title: Roasted Purple Sprouting Broccoli with Puy Lentils and Tahini Dressing
summary: This salad is full of vibrant green veg and Merchant Gourmet Puy Lentils. Tossed with a creamy tahini and lemon dressing, it's ideal for a quick lunch.

ingredients.label: 2 x 250g Packs of Merchant Gourmet Puy Lentils
ingredients.name: Cooked Puy Lentils

ingredients.label: 2 x 250g Packs of Merchant Gourmet Puy Lentils
ingredients.name: Lentil

method.description: Trim the end of the purple sprouting broccoli, then halve widthways and any thicker stems lengthways.
Place in a roasting pan, drizzle generously with olive oil and salt, toss well and place into the oven for about 15 mins, turning once, until cooked through with some good colour.
Meanwhile, heat a splash of olive oil in a large pan over a high heat, add the kale and stir fry for a few mins until charred and crispy. Set aside.
Add the lentils to a bowl along with the juice and zest of half a lemon, a drizzle of olive oil and a pinch of salt. Mix well
In a small bowl mix the tahini with the juice of a lemon, a glug of olive oil and a splash of water. It should be creamy and emulsified but not too thick, the consistency of double cream.
Once cooled, add the broccoli, kale, and lentils to a bowl, pour in the dressing and toss well.
Plate up and top with a generous sprinkle of chopped mint and a big spoon of pomegranate seeds.

chefs.name: Jordon Ezra King
chefs.summary: Jordon Ezra King is a chef and storyteller. Having cooked, temped, and staged his way through a host of kitchens around the world, Jordon has now set his sights on sharing his knowledge with the world, using his platform to teach people how to work their way around a kitchen and educate them about the provenance of the dishes they're cooking while he does it.
